questionHtml: Sketch an energy profile for the decomposition of calcium carbonate based on your answer to b(i), labelling the axes and activation energy, Ea.
markschemeHtml:
endothermic sketch ✓

x-axis labelled “extent of reaction/progress of reaction/reaction coordinate/reaction pathway” AND y-axis labelled “potential energy/energy/enthalpy✓

activation energy/Ea ✓


Do not accept “time” for x-axis.

meta.title: Sketch an energy profile for the decomposition of calcium carbonate based on your answer to b(i), labelling the axes and activation energy, Ea.
